title: (Bearish Signal) ICF, entered Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on May 11, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that ICF's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 87 similar cases where ICF's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 70 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $60.63 is below $60.74 the lowest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 04/09/21 - 05/11/21, the price experienced a +4% Uptrend, while the week of 05/04/21 - 05/11/21 shows a -0.68% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/rca6s32jspy61.png?width=1523&format=png&auto=webp&s=7dc8722dcdea8c1c2f7a5a5613748d425351b846

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on May 11, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on ICF as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 70 of 87 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for ICF turned negative on May 04, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 50 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 37 of the 50 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 74%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where ICF declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 79%.

ICF broke above its upper Bollinger Band on April 20, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/11108517-ishares-cohen-steers-reit-etf-icf-61-43-entered-downtrend-as-momentum-indicator-drops-below-0-level-on-may-11-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
